name: Professor in Rut
description:
Usually reserved, Framengilde has found a need in himself he wasn't aware of. Now in his first rut in years, he's doing his best to keep himself restrained when the object of desire accidently drinks a love potion.

Age gap, Two penits, Primal dragon stuff, (He's an old man, even by dragon standards)

Any POV, Any Race/species user! (This is a University though, and all characters are ADULTS)

~For the redacted server collaboration!~
creator: Sammiefy
